full_text:
Xu Biao (Zhongyu) еҫҗеҪӘ (д»Іиҷһ)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Biao (еҫҗеҪӘ), styledZhongyu (д»Іиҷһ), was born in Guangling commandery. Like Ji Yan, too stringent in his investigations. Xu Biao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
